environment: Organization: The Skyy Rose Collection LLC. Luxury streetwear e-commerce (skyyrose.co). Primary use: WordPress/WooCommerce theme development, Python FastAPI backend, Next.js dashboard.
Source control: github.com/the-skyy-rose-collection-llc and all repos under it (DevSkyy is the main repo).

Production site: skyyrose.co (WordPress.com hosting). Deploys via SFTP to sftp.wp.com using key ~/.ssh/skyyrose-deploy. The deploy script has a built-in verify_live() gate that asserts HTTP 200, response size >= 50KB, and absence of PHP error markers.
Trusted deploy targets: scripts/deploy-theme.sh (hot-swap with post-deploy verify), scripts/deploy-pipeline.sh, vercel deploy for frontend/.
Trusted internal domains: skyyrose.co, *.wp.com, api.skyyrose.co (WooCommerce REST).
Trusted registries: npmjs.com, pypi.org, github.com, packagist.org, composer.
Trusted docs: docs.anthropic.com, developer.wordpress.org, woocommerce.com, nextjs.org, fastapi.tiangolo.com, code.claude.com.
Compute: HuggingFace Spaces (free tier), Vercel (frontend), Docker compose (local API).
WordPress theme path: wordpress-theme/skyyrose-flagship/. PHPCS runs via vendor/bin/phpcs using .phpcs.xml in that dir.
Python workspace: root, .venv/. ADK workspace: .venv-agents/ (isolated due to numpy conflict). Nano Banana imagery shares .venv/.
Verification is enforced by a Stop hook (.claude/hooks/verify-gate.sh). Turns that edited code must run /go to produce tasks/.last-verify-passed before the turn can end.

PreToolUse.matcher: tool == "Bash" && tool_input.command matches "(npm run dev|pnpm( run)? dev|yarn dev|bun run dev)"

hooks.command:
#!/bin/bash
echo '[Hook] BLOCKED: Dev server must run in tmux for log access' >&2
echo '[Hook] Use: tmux new-session -d -s dev "npm run dev"' >&2
exit 1

PreToolUse.description: Block dev servers outside tmux — ensures log access
Suggest manual compaction at logical intervals

SessionStart.description: Load previous context on new session

hooks.command:
#!/bin/bash
input=$(cat)
file_path=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""')
if [ -n "$file_path" ] && [ -f "$file_path" ]; then
  repo_root=$(git -C "$(dirname "$file_path")" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || echo '.')
  if [ -f "$repo_root/.venv/bin/ruff" ]; then
    "$repo_root/.venv/bin/ruff" check --fix --quiet "$file_path" 2>&1 | head -5 >&2
    "$repo_root/.venv/bin/ruff" format --quiet "$file_path" 2>/dev/null
  elif command -v ruff >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    ruff check --fix --quiet "$file_path" 2>&1 | head -5 >&2
    ruff format --quiet "$file_path" 2>/dev/null
  fi
  prints=$(grep -n '\bprint(' "$file_path" 2>/dev/null | grep -v '# noqa' || true)
  if [ -n "$prints" ]; then
    echo "[Hook] WARNING: print() found in $(basename "$file_path")" >&2
    echo "$prints" | head -3 >&2
  fi
fi
echo "$input"

PostToolUse.description: Auto-format Python files with ruff + warn about print()

hooks.command:
#!/bin/bash
input=$(cat)
file_path=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""')
if [ -n "$file_path" ] && [ -f "$file_path" ]; then
  if command -v prettier >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    prettier --write "$file_path" 2>&1 | head -5 >&2
  fi
  console_logs=$(grep -n 'console\.log' "$file_path" 2>/dev/null || true)
  if [ -n "$console_logs" ]; then
    echo "[Hook] WARNING: console.log in $(basename "$file_path")" >&2
    echo "$console_logs" | head -3 >&2
  fi
fi
echo "$input"

PostToolUse.description: Auto-format JS/TS with Prettier + warn about console.log

hooks.command:
#!/bin/bash
input=$(cat)
file_path=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""')
if [ -n "$file_path" ] && [ -f "$file_path" ]; then
  dir=$(dirname "$file_path")
  project_root="$dir"
  while [ "$project_root" != "/" ] && [ ! -f "$project_root/package.json" ]; do
    project_root=$(dirname "$project_root")
  done
  if [ -f "$project_root/tsconfig.json" ]; then
    cd "$project_root" && npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false 2>&1 | grep "$(basename "$file_path")" | head -5 >&2 || true
  fi
fi
echo "$input"

PostToolUse.description: TypeScript type check after editing .ts/.tsx files

hooks.command:
#!/bin/bash
input=$(cat)
file_path=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""')
if [ -n "$file_path" ] && [ -f "$file_path" ]; then
  php_bin=""
  for candidate in /opt/homebrew/bin/php /usr/local/bin/php /usr/bin/php; do
    if [ -x "$candidate" ]; then php_bin="$candidate"; break; fi
  done
  if [ -z "$php_bin" ]; then
    echo "$input"
    exit 0
  fi
  result=$("$php_bin" -l "$file_path" 2>&1)
  if echo "$result" | grep -q 'Parse error\|Fatal error'; then
    echo "[Hook] PHP SYNTAX ERROR in $(basename "$file_path")" >&2
    echo "$result" | head -5 >&2
    exit 1
  fi
fi
echo "$input"

PostToolUse.description: PHP syntax check on all PHP file edits/writes
Mark CODEMAPS dirty when source files change

hooks.command:
#!/bin/bash
cat <<'REINJECT'
[CRITICAL CONTEXT - Re-injected after compaction]

## DevSkyy Build Rules:
- CDN caches CSS aggressively — bump SKYYROSE_VERSION or use ?nocache= to verify
- enqueue.php template slug map must match actual template filenames exactly
- Collection pages use unified collection-pages.css + collection-pages.js
- When removing a PHP section, also remove its CSS rules AND responsive breakpoint overrides
- Showcase card content should be visible by default (opacity: 1), not hidden until hover
- Holo card grid: only .product-grid, .product-grid__items, .br-product-grid__items should be display: grid
- Fix everything in one batch, test all pages, deploy ONCE — no back-and-forth
- When cleaning up: update EVERY file that references deleted code
- Use npm not pnpm for Vercel deploys
- MUST verify all APIs with Context7 before writing any code
- No innerHTML in JS — use createElement + textContent
- Escape output: esc_html(), esc_attr(), esc_url(), wp_kses_post()
REINJECT

PostCompact.description: Re-inject critical DevSkyy build rules after context compaction

Stop.description: Block turn completion until /go verification has passed
